writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your neighbourhood
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing the places near your home. Use a/an and the correctly.
writing.sampleAnswer: There is a supermarket near my house. The supermarket is open every day. There is also a small park next to it.
checklist: Dùng a/an khi nhắc lần đầu, the khi nhắc lại
Có ít nhất 2 địa điểm trong khu phố
Câu văn rõ nghĩa, mạch lạc

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Give a location
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing the location of a place using prepositions of place (in/on/at/next to/opposite/between).
writing.sampleAnswer: The pharmacy is next to the post office, between the café and the bank. The cinema is opposite the market.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 3 giới từ nơi chốn khác nhau
Vị trí được mô tả rõ ràng, dễ hình dung
Không trộn lẫn in/on/at sai nghĩa
